checklist.evidence: component-spec.md defines all function signatures, parameters, return types, and behavior matrices for autoDetectProvider(), writeProviderConfig(), and all UI components

checklist.item: All modules designed with clear responsibilities
checklist.evidence: module-design.md defines 4 modules (M1: Auto-Detection, M2: Installer Selection, M3: Configuration, M4: Documentation) with responsibilities, file changes, integration points, and implementation order

checklist.item: UI wireframes exist for all screens
checklist.note: This feature has no web/GUI UI. The 'screens' are CLI prompts (2-option menu, Next Steps display). Wireframe equivalents are defined as exact text output in module-design.md sections 3.2.1-3.4.3 and component-spec.md sections 3-6.

checklist.evidence: architecture-overview.md sections 5.1 (Provider Selection at Runtime) and 5.2 (Installation Flow) document full user flows. Error taxonomy section 4 documents the failure mode decision tree.
error-taxonomy.md defines 13 error codes across 4 categories (auto-detection, router, configuration, installer) with severity, messages, and recovery actions
validation-rules.json defines 18 validation rules covering all inputs, configuration constraints, and invariants

Traceability verified: REQ-001 (provider.md toggle in M3), REQ-002 (model updates in M3), REQ-003 (CLAUDE.md template in M4), REQ-004 (installer in M2), REQ-005 (docs in M4), REQ-006 (auto-detect in M1). NFR-001 (zero-config via M1+M2), NFR-002 (guard clause invariant VR-017), NFR-003 (fail-open error handling). All 14 ACs traced.

autoDetectProvider() function signature, return type, and behavior matrix fully specified. Integration with existing selectProvider() and selectWithFallback() documented. No breaking changes to existing function signatures (VR-017).

articles_checked.name: Specification Primacy
articles_checked.evidence: All designs trace to requirements-spec.md (6 REQs, 3 NFRs, 14 ACs). Module design sections include explicit requirement traceability tables. No implementation without specification.

articles_checked.name: Explicit Over Implicit
articles_checked.evidence: All design decisions documented explicitly. Behavior matrix in component-spec.md covers all input combinations. Error handling documented for every failure mode. No [UNKNOWN] markers remain.

articles_checked.name: Simplicity First
articles_checked.evidence: Single new function (autoDetectProvider, ~40 lines). No new files created. No new dependencies. 2-option menu instead of 6. Reuses existing infrastructure (selectWithFallback, checkProviderHealth, writeFile).

articles_checked.name: Artifact Traceability
articles_checked.evidence: Every module, function, and UI component traces to specific REQs and ACs. Traceability tables in module-design.md sections 2.8, 3.5, 4.3, 5.2. Validation rules trace to requirements in validation-rules.json.

articles_checked.name: Quality Gate Integrity
articles_checked.evidence: All 8 GATE-03 checklist items pass. Module designs, component specs, error taxonomy, and validation rules are complete.
